title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | June 9, 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: NCLT/insolvency name; avoid even while trading, may get delisted.
recommendations.detail: Not trading currently; likely a halt due to restructuring / an NCLT (insolvency) case. May even get delisted if whoever acquires it via NCLT chooses not to keep the listing. General caution: avoid NCLT/IBC (insolvency & bankruptcy) names even while trading; if invested, treat it as money you can afford to lose.

recommendations.note: Near bottom, will consolidate 140-150; partial ~25% averaging acceptable.
recommendations.detail: HOLD. No need to average; stock is literally near its bottom and will consolidate between Rs 140–150. Results are out; order book is strong; key watch is execution timing. Result-wise, slow improvement expected (receivables rising, from September quarter). If the viewer has the appetite, a partial ~25% averaging is acceptable.

recommendations.note: Sunrise BESS segment but March result weak; watch execution, be careful.
recommendations.detail: A company in a best/"sunrise" segment (battery energy storage systems; AP-linked large order book). Treated as a "dark horse" (as flagged in a prior workshop). Caution warranted: March result was slightly disappointing (top line and bottom line fell), though buying emerged in that dip. Watch final execution capabilities. (Counter to be a bit careful with.)

recommendations.note: Hold with trailing stop-loss; dialysis leader, could become four-figure.
recommendations.detail: HOLD with a trailing stop-loss. Could become a four-figure stock. Leadership position in the dialysis segment; as a listed name it should attract more funds. (Not a profit-book recommendation.)

recommendations.note: Book some if holding large quantity, otherwise continue holding.
recommendations.detail: Has delivered an extraordinary profit / wonderful returns. If holding a large number, book some profit; otherwise can continue holding. (Kutumba Rao's general guidance; Kranti separately commented on the recent vertical move / correction risk — that part is Kranti's, not included as a Kutumba Rao call.)

recommendations.note: Exit into rallies; railway up-cycle over, made a new low.
recommendations.detail: That buy price won't return anytime soon. The best of times for railway stocks is over; exit into rallies rather than holding hopefully. Stocks still offer good trading opportunities — RVNL recently fell to ~250, bounced to ~305–310 in an intermittent rally, then made a new low — so exit on trading rallies.

recommendations.note: Consolidating after sharp run; trailing stop ~8,600, fresh rally needs >9,200.
recommendations.detail: Company performing well; stock approached ~10,000 then corrected. It went up too rapidly (7,500 to ~9,700 in two sessions), so it will consolidate. A fresh rally needs a move back above 9,200. As of now, keep a trailing stop around 8,600.

recommendations.note: In good profit; FOC or partial ~25% booking, decide exit individually.
recommendations.detail: All four are good companies; he is in good profits. Booking is a personal decision: options include FOC (free-of-cost — take out the principal, let the rest run) or booking ~25% partially and holding the rest. Decide exit timing individually, especially when in profit.

recommendations.note: In good profit; FOC or partial ~25% booking, decide exit individually.
In good profit; FOC or partial ~25% booking, decide exit individually.
In good profit; FOC or partial ~25% booking, decide exit individually.
Steel resilient; monthly call still has time, hold as of now.
+30%; keep trailing stop, potential to rise further.
recommendations.detail: Keep a trailing stop. Both were given as investment ideas. Diffusion now ~330 (recently went to ~400 and corrected); there is potential to rise further from here.

recommendations.note: +30%; keep trailing stop, given as an investment idea.
Defence buying strong; caution chasing after big rally from 372 (Apr 1).
recommendations.detail: HOLD. New defence names (Idea Forge, Paras Defence) have been attracting buying. Touched ~990–1,000 and is trading ~960 after a modest correction. Showed a turnaround performance at March-ending, after which the stock jumped sharply. Caution on chasing: it was at 372 on April 1 — note how large the rally has been from 372 (April 1) to today (June 9).
